name: flarecms
description: Flare CMS - Edge-first headless CMS built for Cloudflare Workers
author: Jaime Aleman

scripts.deploy:cms: echo '⚠️  Deploy via CI/CD: merge develop → main, then git push. GitHub Actions handles the rest.'
scripts.deploy:site: echo '⚠️  Deploy via CI/CD: merge develop → main, then git push. GitHub Actions handles the rest.'
scripts.deploy:all: echo '⚠️  Deploy via CI/CD: merge develop → main, then git push. GitHub Actions handles the rest.'
scripts.dev:cms: echo 'Run wrangler dev in packages/cms/ tmux pane'
scripts.dev:site: echo 'Run pnpm dev in packages/site/ tmux pane'
